title: Kingdom diagnosis
description: Plant / mineral / animal map. Separate card; keys unchanged: kingdom_classification__*

sub_fields.label: Where you are narrowing (broad → narrow)
sub_fields.helper: Flow: kingdom → subkingdom → source. Miasm (pace/depth) is recorded separately.

sub_fields.label: Case-taking depth used for kingdom (Sensation Method)
sub_fields.helper: Kingdom from core sensation / nature of state (esp. Level 5). Miasm pace is separate.

sub_fields.label: Kingdom — patterns with intensity (1 = strongest here)
options: Plant — sensitivity & reactivity; inner ‘it affects / hurts me’
Mineral — structure & completeness; identity, position, performance (issue with self)
Animal — survival; competition; victim vs aggressor; hierarchy; split
sub_fields.helper: Tick all that fit this case; use intensity to show how loud each line is (cumulative picture).

sub_fields.label: Chief story style (three-kingdom talk pattern)
options: ‘After me; must beat it’ survival story (animal cue)
‘Affects / hurts me’ — weepy, inner impact (plant cue)
sub_fields.helper: Sankaran: e.g. headache with date-time structure vs pursued vs ‘really affects me, I weep’.

sub_fields.label: Patient’s own language (verbatim)
sub_fields.placeholder: Exact phrases: incompleteness, attacked, hierarchy, ‘if only I were complete’, sensory hurt…

sub_fields.label: If mineral: central structure ‘lack’
sub_fields.helper: Mineral: problem felt as own lack/stability, not primarily ‘what they did to me’.

sub_fields.label: If mineral: ‘with self’ narrative
sub_fields.placeholder: e.g. bear with others because not independent; insecurity is the core issue…

sub_fields.label: If mineral: column (perception, not outer success)
options: Right — loss; alone; complete without help; falling apart
sub_fields.helper: Successful in reality but feels powerless → column from that perceived loss.

sub_fields.label: If mineral + metal: defense vs performance row
options: N/A — not mineral or not metal
Row 4 — defense-heavy metals (Mn, Fe, Co, Ni, Cu, Zn)
Row 5 — performance metals (Rh, Pd, Ag, Cd, In…)

sub_fields.label: If mineral: class (metal / ion / salt / acid)
options: Cation — IA relate / IIA support / III confusion–cobweb
Anion — V alone-unloved / VI huge effort / VII betrayed / IV C–Si unreactive
Acid — constant struggle then collapse (that element)

sub_fields.label: If plant: family shared sensation
sub_fields.placeholder: One nucleus for the family (e.g. injured/hurt); Arnica vs Chamomilla same hurt, different expression.

sub_fields.label: If plant: expression mode
sub_fields.helper: Same family sensation may be passive, active, or compensatory.

sub_fields.label: If plant: same family, different remedy (optional)
sub_fields.placeholder: e.g. shock group: Nux vs Gels vs Ign — depth differentiated under Miasm section, not here.

sub_fields.label: If animal: local sensations
options: No single clear local — many locals (cue)
Locals keep collapsing to survival / hierarchy / one vs other
Strong local but narrative still animal

sub_fields.label: If animal: gestures & energy (one thing acting on other)
sub_fields.placeholder: Pounce, bite, tear, chase; hands show attack vs victim.

sub_fields.label: If animal: extreme pace / restlessness
options: Very high — consider Insecta / Arachnida vs fast predator mammal
